browser_content.captures: Firefox document text through AT-SPI during normal browsing; BiDi only when explicitly launched in diagnostic mode
browser_content.normal_browser_launch: must not add --remote-debugging-port; use accessibility bridge env only
browser_content.fast_tick: abyss-nervous-browser-content-capture.timer runs every 60s while Firefox is open and skips when Firefox is closed
browser_content.dedupe: raw captures are deduplicated by url hash, title hash, text hash, and skipped_text flag before append
browser_content.privacy: no cookies, no localStorage, no form values; body text is skipped on login/password-like pages

browser_content_capture.idle_behavior: exit 0 without writing when Firefox is closed

screenshot_capture.reason: automatic screenshot capture must be invisible to the operator: on normal GNOME desktop it uses an allowlisted org.gnome.Screenshot DBus-owner route into GNOME Shell with flash=false; during active game or fullscreen X11/Xwayland game contexts it must skip GNOME Shell screenshot backends, first try non-focus X11/Xwayland window capture, then grim, then skip with evidence instead of minimizing the game; plain gnome-screenshot is operator-visible/noisy and requires ABYSS_NERVOUS_ALLOW_NOISY_SCREENSHOT=1 for explicit diagnostic opt-in, while direct GNOME Shell DBus remains explicit opt-in

clipboard_capture.reason: automatic clipboard capture is enabled; wl-paste is the only available GNOME/Wayland backend on this machine and known GNOME Shell log noise is recorded as backend quality instead of silently disabling collection

boundaries.machine_layer: host facts, storage routes, privacy policy, passive local evidence
boundaries.stack_layer: runtime services and future service bridge consumers
boundaries.aoa_repositories: source material under reformation, read-only until each repo publishes a stable import contract
boundaries.work_root_rule: Do not use /work for machine-owned caches, runtimes, model artifacts, or logs.
boundaries.symlink_tail_rule: Do not leave symlink tails for machine-owned routes unless explicitly approved.

promotion_rules: Candidate models and services are promoted only with local evidence.
Community reports are signals, not promotion evidence.
Private connector facts require explicit source policy, redaction, retention, and audit.
Absent measurements must stay absent; do not invent benchmark claims.

privacy_gate.pause_behavior: suppress fact writes and append audit heartbeat
privacy_gate.private_mode_behavior: write minimal heartbeat without detailed facts
privacy_gate.forget_behavior: atomic JSONL rewrite plus audit event
